title: Carry out post-mortem examination of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out post-mortem examination of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to conduct post-mortem/necropsy

pcs.text: Select site for post-mortem, ensuring compliance with biosecurity and environment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select site for post-mortem, ensuring compliance with biosecurity and environment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select site for post-mortem, ensuring compliance with biosecurity and environment requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare post-mortem site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare post-mortem site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare post-mortem site.

pcs.text: Collect and collate all relevant preliminary information about the carcass to be examined
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and collate all relevant preliminary information about the carcass to be examined?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and collate all relevant preliminary information about the carcass to be examined.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety and biosecurity hazards, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety and biosecurity hazards, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety and biosecurity hazards, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare equipment and resources required to complete post-mortem examination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare equipment and resources required to complete post-mortem examination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare equipment and resources required to complete post-mortem examination.

pcs.text: Move the animal to be examined to the post-mortem area using appropriate manual lifting techniques and equipment where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move the animal to be examined to the post-mortem area using appropriate manual lifting techniques and equipment where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move the animal to be examined to the post-mortem area using appropriate manual lifting techniques and equipment where applicable.

pcs.text: Seek expert assistance if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek expert assistance if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek expert assistance if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to conduct post-mortem/necropsy

elements.title: Carry out post-mortem examination

pcs.text: Carry out external assessment and note outward signs of disease, injury or abnormality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out external assessment and note outward signs of disease, injury or abnormality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out external assessment and note outward signs of disease, injury or abnormality.

pcs.text: Seek expert advice and assistance before proceeding where unusual symptoms are present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek expert advice and assistance before proceeding where unusual symptoms are present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek expert advice and assistance before proceeding where unusual symptoms are present.

pcs.text: Perform post-mortem of the carcass in a systematic and safe manner using appropriate techniques and equipment, without causing artificial damage to organs and tissues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform post-mortem of the carcass in a systematic and safe manner using appropriate techniques and equipment, without causing artificial damage to organs and tissues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform post-mortem of the carcass in a systematic and safe manner using appropriate techniques and equipment, without causing artificial damage to organs and tissues.

pcs.text: Examine organs, tissues and joints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine organs, tissues and joints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine organs, tissues and joints.

pcs.text: Take samples of organs and tissues where appropriate, and place in labelled containers according to laboratory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples of organs and tissues where appropriate, and place in labelled containers according to laboratory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples of organs and tissues where appropriate, and place in labelled containers according to laboratory requirements.

pcs.text: Record relevant data and details of the post-mortem examination and suggest the cause of death where possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record relevant data and details of the post-mortem examination and suggest the cause of death where possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record relevant data and details of the post-mortem examination and suggest the cause of death where possible.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out post-mortem examination

elements.title: Carry out post-necropsy procedures

pcs.text: Dispose of carcass and biological materials according to biosecurity and environment requirements and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of carcass and biological materials according to biosecurity and environment requirements and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of carcass and biological materials according to biosecurity and environment requirements and legislation.

pcs.text: Send labelled and packaged samples to the laboratory for analysis according to workplace, environment and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Send labelled and packaged samples to the laboratory for analysis according to workplace, environment and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Send labelled and packaged samples to the laboratory for analysis according to workplace, environment and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Collate all information about the livestock examined and the records made during the post-mortem, and forward to supervisor or veterinarian for analysis and establishing a diagnosis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate all information about the livestock examined and the records made during the post-mortem, and forward to supervisor or veterinarian for analysis and establishing a diagnosis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate all information about the livestock examined and the records made during the post-mortem, and forward to supervisor or veterinarian for analysis and establishing a diagnosis.

pcs.text: Clean, disinfect, store and dispose of equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, disinfect, store and dispose of equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, disinfect, store and dispose of equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and disinfect site used for the post-mortem according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and disinfect site used for the post-mortem according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and disinfect site used for the post-mortem according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Wash hands and exposed body areas thoroughly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wash hands and exposed body areas thoroughly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wash hands and exposed body areas thoroughly.

pcs.text: Change clothing and disinfect boots according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Change clothing and disinfect boots according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Change clothing and disinfect boots according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out post-necropsy procedures

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
